headline: AMGEN TO PRESENT AT THE LEERINK PARTNERS 2026 GLOBAL HEALTHCARE CONFERENCE
summary: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) will present at the Leerink Partners 2026 Global Healthcare Conference at 9:20 a.m. ET on Wednesday, March 11, 2026. Peter Griffith, executive vice president and chief financial officer at Amgen, and Jasper van Grunsven, senior vice president of rare disease at Amgen, will participate in a fireside chat at the conference. The webcast will be broadcast over the internet simultaneously and will be available to members of the news media, investors and the general public.

headline: Amgen Faces Rocatinlimab Halt And Rethinks Pipeline And Capital Priorities
summary: Amgen (NasdaqGS:AMGN) and Kyowa Kirin have stopped all clinical trials of rocatinlimab after newly identified safety concerns. The companies cited potential links between OX40 pathway modulation and malignancies as the reason for the halt. The decision affects ongoing studies in multiple indications and removes a late stage candidate from Amgen's R&D pipeline. For a company like Amgen, which focuses on biologic therapies for serious diseases, the loss of a late stage asset such as...

headline: Is Amgen (AMGN) Pricing Reflect Its Recent 24% One Year Share Price Return
summary: If you are wondering whether Amgen's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, this breakdown will help you separate the headline moves from the underlying value story. Amgen shares last closed at US$379.27, with returns of 10.0% over the past 30 days and 23.6% over the past year, while the 7 day return of a 1.3% decline shows that shorter term sentiment can still shift quickly. Recent attention on Amgen has been shaped by ongoing discussion around its pipeline and broader...
